introSection: Ultra Twister was a steel pipeline roller coaster located at Tokyo Dome City in Bunkyo, Tokyo, Japan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 6 riders per car.

fullText:
Ultra Twister was a steel pipeline roller coaster located at Tokyo Dome City in Bunkyo, Tokyo, Japan.



Single car trains. Riders are arranged 2 across in 3 rows for a total of 6 riders per car.
